evals.prompt: 把这个 AI 视频套用现有 CapCut 模板生成一个新草稿，字幕我给你三行。
evals.expected_output: Agent should run create-capcut-draft.mjs with a template, source video, draft name, captions, then run validate-capcut-draft.mjs and tell the user to reopen CapCut if it was already running.

evals.prompt: 我看到草稿目录生成了，但 CapCut 首页不显示这个草稿，帮我查原因。
evals.expected_output: Agent should inspect root_meta_info.json, draft_info.path, Timelines/project.json, Timelines/<draft_info.id>, nested draft_info/template files, stale template markers, then repair or regenerate with --force.

evals.prompt: 帮我检查这个 AI 视频有没有明显 AI 痕迹，先抽帧做 contact sheet。
evals.expected_output: Agent should run extract-ai-artifact-frames.mjs with --video or --draft, review contact sheets, and create an issue-oriented review only for publish-blocking artifacts.

evals.prompt: 这个素材慢动作有抽帧感，帮我做不会液化的智能补帧。
evals.expected_output: Agent should use smart-frame-interpolate.mjs with local RIFE ncnn Vulkan, keep TTA enabled, split at scene cuts, avoid minterpolate fallback, and report the output video plus interpolation manifest.
